subcodes.first_line: O servant of the Ancient Beauty! The lights of the Most Great Name have encompassed the horizons of all peoples, yet the heedless remain [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای بنده جمال قدم انوار اسم اعظم آفاق امم را احاطه نموده است ولی غافلین در
subcodes.subjects: @heedlessness and ignorance of the people, @forces of light and darkness; integration and disintegration
